feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I unironically like games that nearly nobody plays or do not receive updates any…
entry.content: I unironically like games that nearly nobody plays or do not receive updates anymore, like EU4, Roboquest, Darkest Hour, various wargames...what causes this phenomenon? I also like most games with "mixed" reviews on steam and actually play them more than many "overwhelmingly positive" reviews. Why is that?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Plein Soleil ending plothole nobody talks about
entry.content: Tom dumps Philippe's weighted body off the back of the moving boat. Months later they haul the boat out at a marina and the corpse comes up tangled in the propeller which exposes leads to his arrest. now for that to work , the cable has to catch the prop instantly. Intertia keeps it trailing back into the prop as the boat pulls further away. Which means the prop's been fouled since that exact moment. Which means Tom sailed and docked this boat normally for months with a steel wire and a dead cor

entry.title: /int/ International: Grammatical gender isn't that hard
entry.content: At least not in Slovene. I can teach you in 30 seconds how to correctly guess the gender. If noun ends in a consonant, it's masculine, if it ends with an 'a', it's feminine, if it ends with an 'e' or 'o', it's neuter. You're welcome.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: https://x.com/vxunderground/status/ 2073427396535963967 > GDID assigned to each …
entry.content: https://x.com/vxunderground/status/ 2073427396535963967 > GDID assigned to each OS install > GDID unique to each device > GDID only change if OS wiped > Stokes GDID 6755467234350028 > GDID reported internet activity to Microsoft > GDID showed Stokes using Ngrok > GDID reported Stokes IP address > GDID showed Stokes web activity > GDID showed timestamps of web activity > GDID mapped with video game activity > GDID showed games played > GDID undocumented > GDID only mentioned in one MSDN document

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Anons...
entry.content: I've been drifting around for about a years and a half... But I think I just Want Gnome back (without Gnome apps ofc). I want to quickly switch tabs. I want something fully-featured and stable. I want something consistent. I want something that... Just werks. Cinnamon, KDE, XFCE, IceWM have been some of my favorites and they each do some things better, but none of them are simply good in every area. I think it's time to go home.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: In the Simpsons series finale, Homer gets into an argument with Marge and goes t…
entry.content: In the Simpsons series finale, Homer gets into an argument with Marge and goes to Moe's, where Lenny convinces him to "kill them all". Homer proceeds to get drunk and begins to drive home, but on his way Lenny's words become louder and louder in his head, eventually he goes to buy drugs from Snake and takes a stop at "Sneed's Shotguns". Homer bursts through the door shouting "FRED FLINTSTONE'S HOME, BITCH", but he quickly realizes that it's Flanders's house. He then bursts into his home and shoo

No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Behold the future of gaming in a non-physical copy world
entry.content: >Buy RE 8 Village for PS5 years ago on the PS store >Felt like playing it since I haven't played it in a while >Go into PS store to download it again >PS store acknowledges that I've bought the game in the past since it says add to library instead of just showing the price for the game >Attempt to download >PS store tells me I have to pay for the game again >Look up why it is making me pay for the game again >People with the same problem online say that since they've updated the game quiet a bit

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: From the leaks it sounds terrible, and is going about this storyline in too much…
entry.content: From the leaks it sounds terrible, and is going about this storyline in too much of a convoluted manner. It should have worked backwards with it being a soft reboot of everyone already existing in Battleworld, and it being a mystery to uncover of how they all ended up there. With Doctor Doom's characterization being of why should we accept the hand of fate given to us, when we have the power to alter it. That we can be our own gods, and make our own reality. It would play in perfectly to his hub

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: If you could have a video game character living in a house built into your torso…
entry.content: If you could have a video game character living in a house built into your torso, which would it be? They'd be shrunk down to a size proportional to around what I've shown in the image; and they would maintain their abilities from their home series. They teleport back into the home every 24 hours and will be teleported back home if they are more than 30 miles away from you. The home has no affects on the functions of your internal organs or anatomy. The character will maintain their personality

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Everything that you're worried about is going to be gone like that. The people t…
entry.content: Everything that you're worried about is going to be gone like that. The people that are criticizing you, they're going to be gone. You're going to be gone. All this hand-wringing, worry, and concern over, "How are people viewing me?" or, "Someone said something bad about me," and you get so upset about it, is wasted time and energy. Your only focus should be on getting better at what you're doing. Focus on what you're doing. Get better at what you're doing. Everything else is a complete waste of

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If you want to be great, you want to be the baddest mothafucka ever at what you …
entry.content: If you want to be great, you want to be the baddest mothafucka ever at what you do, you will be misunderstood by everybody because you're going to be so obsessed and so driven to get there. That's what it takes. It takes every second of your life. Anybody who says balance... yeah, balance is important for average people. But if you want to go to that edge where people do not like you, don't understand you, question everything you do, you've arrived.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Phone hardware has been good enough to be a computer for a while now, so where t…
entry.content: Phone hardware has been good enough to be a computer for a while now, so where the fuck are the docks? I would love to come home form work, slam my S26 into a dock with a keyboard, mouse, 24 inch monitor and just have everything in one device, or at least my phone replace laptops if Samsung would sell some GalaxyDock with a keyboard trackpad and a screen so I could live out of it when I'm not home.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You know what grinds my fucking gears pizza
entry.content: Margherita is the best one because every other topping sucks my dick. It wouldn't be this way if they diced the toppings but they don't. I bite into a slice that has jalapeño, red onion and pepperoni and I don't have sharp fangs like a feral animal so they don't cut through it, they just drag it all into my mouth so I've got this tiny bite of pizza along with a whole slice of jalapeño, a whole slice of red onion and a whole pepperoni. Just dice them. FUCK

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is this secure enough for Anons?
entry.content: Onionshare-cli --chat is pretty decent and offically supported by tor. OpenSSL is accessible and has post-quantum encryption for v3.5+. Raspberry pi 2w are still cheap (relative to silver/everyone is just poorer from inflation). All the steps I will build into a setup and run script/program. Users just set parameters in a config.txt file. Security is solved and handled by onionshare/tor plus openssl. User experience will be: > flash micro sd card > Start up and setup pi > download and Install th
